element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Established from prior Sonic games; reinforced with simple terrain
Speed boost mechanic; primary offensive tool
Defeated by jumping or spin dash; introduce obstacle navigation
Momentum-based navigation; speed maintenance required
Exploration and alternative path discovery
Spatial awareness; precision platforming
10-minute act timer; oxygen management during underwater sections
Short-duration aerial mobility; complements Sonic's ground speed
Character-specific ability; extends exploration in water zones
Guardian NPC who lays traps; complicates early progression

element_introduction_order.first_appears: End of Act 1 in each zone
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Pattern-based combat; Robotnik's large robots

element_introduction_order.first_appears: End of Act 2 in each zone
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Escalating difficulty; Dr. Robotnik encounters
Protective and restorative items scattered throughout
Core resource; loss triggers damage state; zero rings = life loss
Game progression saving; 6 save slots per playthrough
Risk/reward minigame; bouncing mechanic with disappearing flippers
Exploration rewards; entry to special stages

element_introduction_order.element: Special stages with blue spheres (Chaos Emerald collection)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: 3D isometric-view minigames; 7 emeralds unlock Super Sonic

element_introduction_order.first_appears: After collecting all 7 Chaos Emeralds (post-game unlock)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Invincibility power; narrative climax ability
Instant life loss; precision platforming requirement

typical_relief_triggers: Open flat terrain sections after obstacle gauntlets
typical_tension_triggers: Water zones with drowning timer active
Special stage blue sphere patterns (high-difficulty bonus content)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Classical Sonic rhythm: alternating high-speed momentum sections with precise obstacle navigation; escalating complexity per zone; multiple relief valves (checkpoints, power-ups, varied terrain) prevent sustained tension

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Breakable walls and subtle terrain deviations indicate hidden paths; vertical and horizontal dead-ends branch toward secret passages leading to giant rings and bonus stages
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Secret passages contain giant rings that warp to special stages; breakable walls hide alternative routes and power-ups; spatial exploration rewarded with Chaos Emerald access

difficulty_curve.early_game: Angel Island Zone (Zones 1-2): introductory pace; Knuckles presence as complication rather than threat; simple badnik configurations; establishes core mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Hydrocity Zone onwards (Zones 2-4): introduction of water drowning mechanic; increased miniboss complexity; denser badnik placement; vertical/corkscrewing terrain; Knuckles interference escalates
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final zones (Zones 5-6): complex boss patterns; sustained hazard gauntlets; reduced safe terrain; convergence toward Death Egg confrontation
notable_spikes: Miniboss encounters at zone transitions (pattern learning required)
Boss fights at Act 2 conclusions (escalating Robotnik robot difficulty)
Special stages with blue sphere patterns (high-precision 3D navigation)
Water zones with drowning timer (resource management pressure)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 6 zones divided into Act 1 (miniboss finale) and Act 2 (boss finale); midboss acts as checkpoint/tension break; encourages replay differentiation via character choice
Vertical loops, corkscrews, and launch pads create speed-dependent progression; slowdown forces backtracking or alternate routing; rewards flow state mastery
Hydrocity Zone centers on underwater mechanics with drowning timer; Tails swimming ability offers character-specific advantage; drowning hazard creates temporal pressure
Dense spike/hazard clusters interspersed with open flat terrain and ring caches; visual rhythm breaks tension cyclically; checkpoint placement at high-risk section conclusions
Breakable walls and hidden routes signal optional content; giant ring discovery triggers special stage access; exploration directly tied to Chaos Emerald progression
